'''Sen Udo-Mal''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi Consular|Consular]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]], Sen Udo-Mal received [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] from the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Achieving the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], Udo-Mal had trained independently as a [[Jedi Consular|Consular]] and had constructed his own [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] with which he would uphold the principles of the Republic.<ref name="RPGR" />
